messages.text: How is your day today?)

text: It was actually pretty charming, I was even lauging to myself when I thought about it. So, in the morning I went to inspect one

business branches in Warsaw. After that I took reports, had coffee, and went for my horse riding practice. Than, I went to take a walk in a park with my coach, and afger that I had dinner in a palace. And than it came to my mind: "Marcin, it's like in XVII century" 😂

text_entities.text: It was actually pretty charming, I was even lauging to myself when I thought about it. So, in the morning I went to inspect one
of.my

business branches in Warsaw. After that I took reports, had coffee, and went for my horse riding practice. Than, I went to take a walk in a park with my coach, and afger that I had dinner in a palace. And than it came to my mind: "Marcin, it's like in XVII century" 😂

messages.text: Not bad, how long have you been horse riding?😍

messages.text: I first started right after I graduated from University, my coach was an old cavalery soldier which, as my coach now says, can be seen 😅 I had a long break after my horse died and now I've been back practicing for 2.5 years

What are your favorite drinks? What do you love to eat?)

messages.text: And food, well, I really like meat, so steaks, poultry, fish are all fine, I like straciatella based on mozarella di buffala and italian hot sausage (I know a few great italian resturants, but I'm actually not very fond of pizza), and I have recently discovered shahshuka or whatever, really good for breakfast. In general I really like good restaurants 😊

messages.text:
What?! 
I don’t understand nothing 
What’s happening?

text_entities.text:
What?! 
I don’t understand nothing 
What’s happening?

messages.text: Ok, so look, ok, the tickets are normal thing, you want to travel comfortably and safe, that is more or less understood. Suitcase was of course a bit strange, you have to admit it's not a usual request, but ok, I don't care about some 1500 pln. But when you requested 500 USD 1800 PLN  (if I remember correctly) cash to.cross the border - with 600 PLN legal necessity, I figured it must be a sort of scam or something like that, and I just don't enjoy being made fool of. And it's not like it's the first time I use TG..

messages.text:
Well, that's a completely different complaint. Why not just talk about it and say, 'Let's plan everything down to the last detail if it's important to you?'  
How do people usually meet for the first time? What's a first date like? Do they really plan every little detail? I doubt it

messages.text: Sometimes, you just need to let the moment unfold on its own

messages.text: Oh I'm not complaining at all, I'm just lying out my motives. You are right, of course normally first dates are not planned to the detail, but normally I would simply ask you out to the restaurant, without 20h drive abroad.. but maybe I shouldn't have made assumptions
